sentiment: The most powerful things are learning to fit in your pocket.

stories.title: Steam Machine launches today
stories.summary: Valve's Steam Machine finally ships — PC gaming compressed into a living-room box, no desk required.

stories.title: GLM-5.2 – How to Run Locally
stories.summary: A capable open-source language model you can run on your own hardware — intelligence that doesn't need a data center.

stories.title: VibeThinker: 3B param model that beats Opus 4.5 on reasoning
stories.summary: Three billion parameters outperforming a model orders of magnitude larger — proof that scale isn't the only path to thought.
